title: Better OneBlock [One Block]
description: A modpack created to improve the vanilla One Block experience.
body:
# SUMMARY This was a modpack designed initially for friends, but after many hours spent on making it, I decided to release it to the public so others can enjoy a Better OneBlock experience! Feel free to share any suggestions or report any bugs or glitches you find! !!!Please backup your worlds before updating the modpack!!! The Modpack is based on the Original OneBlock "Mod," where you spawn on a single grass block and are required to break it in order to progress to the next stages in which you unlock more blocks. It contains **0** structure mods, which makes the modpack very easy to update. # PERFORMANCE        _It should be_ **the most performant modpack ever!** it has more than _45 performance based mods_, it all _starts with only OneBlock_ and the other mods are small add-ons and mod libraries, with the biggest mod by far, being [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped). # FAQ
Q: "How do I create a new world?" A: Right now, you must use the "Re-Create" feature located under the "Create New World" Button, which only works on the first "OneBlock" World.
Q: "Horror mod?" A: The "horror" mod is called "Distant Friends". All it does is to spawn some distant entities, mainly using an all-dark skin. These figures can react when stared at and disappear as you approach.
# PLANNED FEATURES:

The following mods may or may not be added based on compatibility, features and requirements:

More Unique Related Advancements.

Custom Recipes for Vanilla Items.

No mob griefing.

Cursery

CobbleGen

Enchantment

Sneaky Curses

Inventory Tabs

Smart Particles

Mobtimizations

Immersive Snow

Smooth Particles

Fluid Void Fading

What's That Slot?

Dynamic Crosshair

Beneath the Wetlands

Backported Spears

Immersive Portals

Nature's Compass

[Let's Do] Furniture

FX's Rail Optimization

Dynamic Surroundings

CoffeeG's Awful Lightning!

Recipe Essentials instead of NERB

Bosses of Mass Destruction

Progressive Bosses

VanillaTweaks

Carpet-Fixes

Goblin Traders

Eternal Starlight

Create Fabric

Hold my Items

MoreCulling

Blanket

New Default+ Everything Animated!

Lucky OneBlock - Lucky Blocks - Stay True: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true - SuperBetterGrass: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass - Distant Friends : https://modrinth.com/mod/distant-friends
